headline: Top Invesco Analyst: The AI Trade That “Lifted All Boats” Is Over. Now Profitability Decides Winners As “Capacity Will Catch Up”
summary: Invesco’s Fiona Lim says the AI-fueled semiconductor surge is shifting from a broad, momentum-driven rally to a tougher phase where stock picking and profitability will separate winners from laggards. Speaking on Bloomberg’s Insight with Haslinda Amin on July 3, Lim, who manages Asia ex-Japan equities, warned that the easy gains are likely behind investors: “The ...
